creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am not only the port maintainer of audio/lame, I'm also one of the project admins of the LAME project. The patent area is NOT clear, no matter what the audacity project claims.

As soon as it is possible to provide packages, I will change the port to do so. Until then it stays like it is (no package distribution). I can not give any ETA about this.
